text:
Once, in a quaint little village, nestled among enchanted forests and where the rivers sang their ancient melodies, there lived a quiet girl named Lily. She wasn't flashy or bold; her charm was in the quiet way she painted the room with her smile. Her days were filled with chores, reading, and drawing beautiful landscapes. One day, a strange thing happened. A shimmering portal appeared one evening while Lily was drawing. Her drawing came to life.

A shimmering squirrel, named Sapling, popped out. Sapling was bright green and spoke with an accent that sounded like a rustling wind. "Oh, hello there! I've heard tales of your beauty and creativity. How about joining me in this wonderland I conjure every night?"

Lily was intrigued. "Wonderland? How do I get there?"

"You simply wait," said Sapling. "Just draw me."

And so she did. She drew them both a cozy glen filled with flowers that floated, rivers
